sentences.text: Rex met a raptor and Ron met a raptor.
Rip ran and a raptor ran past a rib.
Rex got a rib and Rob got a raptor.
Ron and Rip ran past a red raptor.
Rex got a rib and Rip got a rib.
Rex and Ron met a raptor and a rat.
Rob and Rex hid a red rib in a pit.
Rip got a raptor and Rob got a rat.
Rex ran and a raptor ran past Ron.
Ron got a red rib and a raptor.
Rex hid and Rob ran past a red raptor.
Rex and Ron got a rib and a raptor.
Rip and Rex met a raptor and a raptor.
Rob got a rib and Rex got a red rat.
Ron ran and a raptor met a rib.
Rex got a raptor and Rip got a rib.
Rob ran past a raptor and a red rat.
Rex hid a rib and Ron hid a rib.
Rip and Rob met a red raptor in a pit.
Rex got a red rib and Ron got a raptor.
